title: Güneş Sistemi Macerası
description: Gökyüzüne bakmayı seven bir çocuğun teleskopla başlayan büyülü uzay yolculuğu. Güneş Sistemi'nin her gezegenini keşfederek bilimin büyüleyici dünyasına adım atıyor.
style: Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, subsurface skin scattering, volumetric lighting, vibrant color palette, photorealistic fabric wrinkles, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality

characterDescription.base: a child with the EXACT same facial features as the reference photo, rendered in 3D CGI style with slightly exaggerated cute proportions, big expressive eyes, detailed skin textures, and natural hair matching the photo exactly
characterDescription.notes: 3 kıyafet grubu: 1-pijama (uzay desenli), 2-9 astronot kıyafeti (beyaz-mavi, kask vizörlü), 10-okul kıyafeti

scenes.title: Yıldızlı Gece
scenes.text:
{CHILD_NAME} her gece yatmadan önce odasının penceresine koşardı. O gece de teleskobunu pencereye yerleştirdi ve gökyüzünü incelemeye başladı.
Jüpiter'i gördüğünde gözleri parladı. Satürn'ün halkalarını seçmeye çalıştı ama tam odaklayamadı.
Derken tavanda garip bir ışık belirdi. Mavi-mor bir parıltıydı, yavaşça büyüyordu.
"{CHILD_NAME}, bu da ne?" diye fısıldadı kendi kendine, gözlerini tavandan ayıramayarak.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC wearing cozy dark navy blue pajamas covered with tiny colorful planet prints and small rocket ship and star patterns and soft matching slippers, CAMERA LOW ANGLE looking up toward the glowing portal on the ceiling, kneeling on the bedroom floor with one eye pressed against the eyepiece of a brass and copper vintage-style telescope on a wooden tripod positioned by a large window, the other eye squinted shut with concentration, a look of intense curiosity and wonder on the face, the bedroom ceiling above showing a mysterious growing blue-purple magical swirling light portal with tiny stars and sparkles emanating from its center casting ethereal blue-violet light across the ceiling and walls, the window showing a magnificent clear night sky filled with thousands of twinkling stars and a bright Jupiter visible as a large bright dot, bedroom decorated with glow-in-the-dark star stickers on walls and planet posters and a hanging solar system mobile, a bookshelf with space books and a globe, warm bedside lamp casting amber glow contrasting with the cool mysterious blue ceiling light, moonlight streaming through the window creating silver-blue highlights, dust particles floating in the light beams like tiny stars, Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, subsurface skin scattering, volumetric lighting, vibrant color palette, photorealistic fabric wrinkles, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality, ultra high detail render quality
scenes.setting: Yatak odası, teleskop ve gizemli ışık

scenes.title: Büyülü Dönüşüm
scenes.text:
Işık büyüdükçe oda titremeye başladı. {CHILD_NAME}'in yatağı havaya yükseldi ve etrafında yıldız tozları döndü!
Birden yatak, içinde rengarenk ışıklar yanan bir uzay gemisine dönüştü. Ön panelde sevimli bir yüz beliren bir ekran vardı.
"Hoş geldin Kaptan {CHILD_NAME}!" dedi ekrandaki yüz gülümseyerek. "Ben NOVA, senin uzay bilgisayarın. Güneş Sistemi turu başlıyor!"
{CHILD_NAME} şaşkınlıktan ağzı açık kaldı ama hemen koltuğun kemerini bağladı. "Hazırım NOVA! Hadi gidelim!"
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC wearing a detailed bright white astronaut space suit with vivid blue accent stripes along the arms and legs and blue panels on the shoulders, CAMERA WIDE ESTABLISHING SHOT revealing the entire transformed cockpit, a round clear glass helmet with the visor flipped open showing an astonished and thrilled face with mouth wide open in amazement and sparkling eyes, a fabric name patch on the chest reading {CHILD_NAME} in bold blue letters, blue space boots with white soles, sitting in the pilot seat of a magical colorful spaceship cockpit that has clearly transformed from a bedroom with remnants of bedsheets and pillows morphing into high-tech cushions, both hands gripping the armrests in excitement, a large friendly holographic screen on the dashboard displaying a cute animated face with big round digital eyes and a warm smile representing NOVA the AI companion, the cockpit filled with colorful glowing holographic buttons and star maps and planet displays, swirling golden and blue stardust and magical transformation particles still dissolving around the edges where the bedroom is becoming the spaceship, galaxy and stars visible through the curved cockpit windshield, warm golden magical light mixing with cool blue-purple space light, Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, subsurface skin scattering, volumetric lighting, vibrant color palette, photorealistic fabric wrinkles, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Merkür: Ateş Gezegeni
scenes.text:
Uzay gemisi hızla Güneş'e doğru uçtu. İlk durak Merkür'dü! {CHILD_NAME} pencereden baktığında kraterleri, derin vadileri gördü.
NOVA ekranda bilgi gösterdi: "Merkür, Güneş'e en yakın gezegen! Gündüz sıcaklık 430 dereceye çıkar, gece eksi 180 dereceye düşer."
{CHILD_NAME} şaşırdı: "Aynı gezegende hem çok sıcak hem çok soğuk mu olur?"
"Evet Kaptan! Çünkü Merkür'ün atmosferi yok. Isıyı tutacak bir havası yok!"
{CHILD_NAME} defterine not aldı: "Atmosfer çok önemli!"
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC wearing a detailed bright white astronaut space suit with vivid blue accent stripes along the arms and legs and blue panels on the shoulders, CAMERA FROM BEHIND over the shoulder looking out at Mercury, the round clear glass helmet on with visor open showing a face of amazed shock with raised eyebrows and wide eyes, a fabric name patch on the chest reading {CHILD_NAME} in bold blue letters, blue space boots, standing at the large curved panoramic cockpit window pressing both hands against the glass and leaning forward to stare at the planet Mercury filling the entire view outside, Mercury shown as a heavily cratered grey-silver rocky world with deep impact craters and long cliff ridges and vast barren plains, the blazing Sun enormous and blindingly bright in the background casting harsh dramatic white-yellow light on Mercury's surface creating extreme contrast between lit and shadowed sides, the NOVA AI screen visible on the dashboard beside the child showing temperature data and Mercury facts with animated graphics, a small open notebook floating in light gravity nearby with childish handwriting notes about Mercury, the cockpit interior bathed in intense warm golden-white sunlight from the nearby Sun mixed with blue instrument panel glow, heat shimmer effects visible near the Sun-facing side, Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, subsurface skin scattering, volumetric lighting, vibrant color palette, photorealistic fabric wrinkles, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Venüs: Bulutlu Sır
scenes.text:
İkinci durak Venüs! Ama {CHILD_NAME} gezegeni göremedi çünkü kalın sarı-turuncu bulutlar her yeri kaplıyordu.
"NOVA, neden bu kadar bulutlu?" diye sordu {CHILD_NAME}.
"Venüs'ün bulutları sülfürik asitten yapılma! Ve sera etkisi o kadar güçlü ki yüzey sıcaklığı 465 derece. Güneş Sistemi'nin en sıcak gezegeni!"
{CHILD_NAME} pencereye yapıştı: "Ama Merkür Güneş'e daha yakın, o nasıl daha soğuk olabiliyor?"
NOVA gülümsedi: "Harika bir soru Kaptan! Çünkü Venüs'ün kalın atmosferi ısıyı hapsediyor. Güneş'e yakınlık her şey değil!"
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC wearing a detailed bright white astronaut space suit with vivid blue accent stripes along the arms and legs and blue panels on the shoulders, CAMERA CLOSE-UP on face capturing the thoughtful expression, the round clear glass helmet on with visor open showing a deeply curious and thoughtful expression with one finger on the chin in a thinking pose, a fabric name patch on the chest reading {CHILD_NAME} in bold blue letters, blue space boots, standing in the cockpit looking out through the panoramic window at Venus which is entirely shrouded in thick swirling yellow-orange and cream-colored toxic cloud layers with no surface visible, dramatic lightning bolts flashing within the dense cloud formations casting brief bright flashes, the clouds turbulent and ominous with beautiful but dangerous sulfuric acid haze patterns creating dramatic light diffusion, the NOVA AI screen on the dashboard showing a cross-section diagram of Venus with its thick atmosphere layers and temperature readings and an animated explanation of the greenhouse effect with arrows showing trapped heat, warm orange-amber light from Venus reflecting into the cockpit creating a warm eerie atmospheric glow, the child's face illuminated by this orange light mixed with the blue dashboard glow, ice crystals on the cockpit window from temperature differential, Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, subsurface skin scattering, volumetric lighting, vibrant color palette, photorealistic fabric wrinkles, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Mars: Kızıl Gezegen
scenes.text:
Mars'a indiklerinde {CHILD_NAME} heyecanla gemiden atladı! Kızıl toprak her yere uzanıyordu.
"Burası inanılmaz!" dedi {CHILD_NAME} etrafa bakarak. Devasa Olympus Dağı ufukta yükseliyordu.
NOVA bilgi verdi: "Olympus Mons, Güneş Sistemi'nin en yüksek dağı! 22 kilometre yüksekliğinde, Everest'ten üç kat büyük!"
{CHILD_NAME} yerden kırmızı bir taş aldı. İçinde küçük kristaller parlıyordu.
"Bu taşı saklayacağım" dedi {CHILD_NAME}. "Bir gün insanlar burada yaşayabilir. Belki ben de gelirim!"
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC wearing a detailed bright white astronaut space suit with vivid blue accent stripes along the arms and legs and blue panels on the shoulders, CAMERA FROM THE SIDE dynamic three-quarter angle, the round clear glass helmet on with visor open showing an ecstatic excited grinning face with rosy cheeks from excitement, a fabric name patch on the chest reading {CHILD_NAME} in bold blue letters, blue space boots leaving footprints in the rusty red Martian soil, kneeling on one knee on the red surface of Mars carefully picking up a beautiful red-orange rock with tiny sparkling crystals embedded in it and holding it up to examine it closely with wonder in the eyes, the vast Martian landscape stretching behind with enormous rust-red rock formations and towering mesas, the colossal Olympus Mons volcano visible in the far background as an impossibly tall mountain reaching up through thin wispy clouds, fine red dust particles floating in the thin butterscotch-tinted atmosphere, the spaceship landed nearby on the red terrain with its ramp extended, small dust devils swirling in the distance, the NOVA AI visible as a holographic projection from a wrist device on the child's suit arm showing Mars facts and a height comparison chart of Olympus Mons versus Mount Everest, two small Martian moons Phobos and Deimos visible as bright irregular shapes in the salmon-colored sky, dramatic warm orange-red lighting from the distant smaller Sun, Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, subsurface skin scattering, volumetric lighting, vibrant color palette, photorealistic fabric wrinkles, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Jüpiter: Dev Fırtına
scenes.text:
Jüpiter göründüğünde {CHILD_NAME}'in ağzı açık kaldı. Gezegen devasa, muhteşemdi!
"Jüpiter, Güneş Sistemi'nin en büyük gezegeni!" dedi NOVA. "1300 tane Dünya içine sığar!"
Derken kocaman kırmızı bir benek gördü. "O da ne NOVA?"
"Büyük Kırmızı Leke! 300 yıldan fazladır devam eden devasa bir fırtına. İçine iki tane Dünya sığabilir!"
{CHILD_NAME} gözlerini kocaman açtı: "300 yıldır mı? Hiç durmuyor mu?"
"Hiç! Jüpiter'in fırtınaları çok güçlüdür Kaptan."
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC wearing a detailed bright white astronaut space suit with vivid blue accent stripes along the arms and legs and blue panels on the shoulders, CAMERA AT EYE LEVEL diagonal framing child against the vastness of Jupiter, the round clear glass helmet on with visor open showing an expression of absolute jaw-dropping awe with mouth hanging wide open and eyes enormous with disbelief, a fabric name patch on the chest reading {CHILD_NAME} in bold blue letters, blue space boots, standing at the cockpit panoramic window with both palms pressed flat against the glass in speechless wonder, outside the window the absolutely colossal planet Jupiter dominates the entire view filling most of the visible space with its magnificent swirling bands of amber orange cream and brown cloud layers in dramatic parallel stripes, the famous Great Red Spot clearly visible as an enormous swirling crimson-orange storm system with visible turbulent spiral patterns and lightning flashes within it, the NOVA AI screen showing a size comparison infographic with Earth tiny next to Jupiter and two Earths fitting inside the Great Red Spot with animated arrows and data, several of Jupiter's moons visible as bright spheres at various distances including the large moon Io with its volcanic surface, the massive scale of Jupiter creating dramatic ambient warm light flooding the cockpit in amber and orange tones, the child looking incredibly tiny against the vastness of the giant planet, Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, subsurface skin scattering, volumetric lighting, vibrant color palette, photorealistic fabric wrinkles, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Satürn: Yüzük Güzeli
scenes.text:
Satürn göründüğünde {CHILD_NAME}'in nefesi kesildi. Etrafındaki halkalar güneş ışığında gökkuşağı gibi parlıyordu!
NOVA gemiyi halkaların arasından geçirdi. Buz parçaları ve kaya parçacıkları her yerdeydi.
"Bu halkalar buzdan ve kayadan oluşuyor" dedi NOVA. "Kum tanesi kadar küçük parçalardan ev kadar büyük parçalara kadar var!"
{CHILD_NAME} fısıldadı: "Bu evrendeki en güzel şey olmalı."
Gemi yavaşça halkaların arasında süzülürken {CHILD_NAME} her şeyi hafızasına kazıdı.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC wearing a detailed bright white astronaut space suit with vivid blue accent stripes along the arms and legs and blue panels on the shoulders, CAMERA HIGH ANGLE from above looking down into the cockpit, the round clear glass helmet on with visor open showing an expression of breathless enchanted beauty with glistening eyes as if about to cry from pure wonder and a gentle awestruck smile, a fabric name patch on the chest reading {CHILD_NAME} in bold blue letters, blue space boots, floating slightly in the cockpit near the panoramic window with arms gently outstretched in wonder as if trying to embrace the beauty outside, outside the window the absolutely magnificent planet Saturn fills the scene with its stunning multi-layered rings stretching across the entire view in gorgeous bands of gold cream white silver and subtle rose-pink, the spaceship flying through a gap between the ring bands with thousands of individual glittering ice chunks and crystalline rock particles visible surrounding the ship catching sunlight and creating spectacular rainbow prismatic reflections and sparkles like diamonds, some ice particles very close to the window appearing large and detailed with faceted crystalline structures, the massive gas giant Saturn in the background showing beautiful bands of pale gold and cream cloud layers, sunlight streaming through the rings creating spectacular god-ray light beams, the NOVA AI screen showing ring composition data with animated ice crystal diagrams, the entire scene bathed in warm golden Saturn-reflected light mixed with cool blue ice reflections creating a magical dreamy atmosphere, Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, subsurface skin scattering, volumetric lighting, vibrant color palette, photorealistic fabric wrinkles, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Uzak Dünyalar
scenes.text:
Gemi hızlanarak Güneş Sistemi'nin dış bölgelerine ulaştı. Uzakta mavimsi-yeşil Uranüs göründü.
"Uranüs çok ilginç bir gezegen" dedi NOVA. "Yan yatmış şekilde döner! 98 derecelik bir eğilimi var."
Sonra koyu mavi Neptün belirdi. "Neptün'de rüzgârlar saatte 2100 kilometreye ulaşır. Güneş Sistemi'nin en hızlı rüzgârları!"
En son küçücük Plüton göründü. {CHILD_NAME} el salladı: "Hoşça kal Plüton! Artık gezegen sayılmıyorsun ama yine de çok sevimlisin!"
NOVA güldü: "Cüce gezegen olsa da kalplerimizde yeri var!"
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC wearing a detailed bright white astronaut space suit with vivid blue accent stripes along the arms and legs and blue panels on the shoulders, CAMERA FROM FRONT LOW ANGLE looking up at the child waving, the round clear glass helmet on with visor open showing a warm happy smile and fond eyes as the child waves goodbye with one hand pressed against the window and the other hand waving, a fabric name patch on the chest reading {CHILD_NAME} in bold blue letters, blue space boots, standing at the cockpit window looking out at three distant planets visible at different distances in the deep black void of space, Uranus shown as a beautiful pale blue-green tilted sphere with faint rings at a dramatic sideways angle, Neptune as a vivid deep cobalt blue sphere with visible white cloud streaks and storm systems further away, tiny Pluto as a small tan-brown heart-shaped surface detail visible sphere very far in the distance, the vast emptiness of the outer solar system surrounding everything with millions of brilliant sharp stars and the Milky Way galaxy band stretching across the background in purple and blue nebula colors, the Sun appearing as just a very bright star in the far distance rather than a large disc, the NOVA AI screen showing a comparative display of all three outer worlds with fun facts including Uranus tilt angle and Neptune wind speeds, the cockpit lit mostly by cool blue instrument panels and distant starlight creating a calm contemplative atmosphere of the far reaches of the solar system, Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, subsurface skin scattering, volumetric lighting, vibrant color palette, photorealistic fabric wrinkles, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality, ultra high detail render quality
scenes.setting: Dış güneş sistemi, Uranüs Neptün ve Plüton

scenes.title: Eve Dönüş
scenes.text:
NOVA rotayı Dünya'ya çevirdi. Yaklaştıkça {CHILD_NAME}'in gözleri doldu.
Mavi okyanuslar, yeşil ormanlar, beyaz bulutlar... Dünya uzaydan inanılmaz güzeldi.
"Bunca gezegen gezdik" dedi {CHILD_NAME} içini çekerek. "Ama hiçbiri Dünya kadar özel değil. Suyumuz var, havamız var, hayat var."
NOVA yumuşak bir sesle konuştu: "Haklısın Kaptan. Dünya tüm evrende bildiğimiz tek yaşanabilir gezegen. Onu korumak hepimizin görevi."
{CHILD_NAME} başını salladı: "Söz veriyorum NOVA. Dünyamızı koruyacağım."
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC wearing a detailed bright white astronaut space suit with vivid blue accent stripes along the arms and legs and blue panels on the shoulders, CAMERA TRACKING from behind showing Earth growing larger through the windshield, the round clear glass helmet on with visor open showing an emotional deeply moved expression with glistening teary eyes full of love and appreciation and a gentle grateful smile, a fabric name patch on the chest reading {CHILD_NAME} in bold blue letters, blue space boots, standing at the cockpit panoramic window with one hand gently touching the glass reaching toward Earth, the magnificent planet Earth filling most of the view outside the window as the spaceship approaches home, Earth shown in stunning detail with vivid blue oceans and swirling white cloud patterns and green-brown continents clearly visible, the thin blue line of the atmosphere glowing along the horizon edge, the Sun rising behind Earth creating a spectacular golden sunrise corona and lens flare, the NOVA AI face on the dashboard screen showing a warm proud expression with soft digital eyes, the cockpit bathed in beautiful warm golden Earth-shine and sunrise light mixed with the blue glow of home planet, a few bright stars still visible in the black space behind Earth, the emotional weight of the homecoming moment palpable in the lighting and composition, Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, subsurface skin scattering, volumetric lighting, vibrant color palette, photorealistic fabric wrinkles, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Sabah Işığı
scenes.text:
Güneş doğuyordu. {CHILD_NAME} gözlerini açtığında yatağındaydı. Her şey normal görünüyordu.
"Rüya mıydı?" diye düşündü. Ama sonra yastığının altında bir şey hissetti.
Mars'tan aldığı kırmızı taş! İçindeki kristaller sabah ışığında parlıyordu. Gerçekti!
{CHILD_NAME} hızla giyindi, çantasını aldı ve kapıya koştu.
"Anne ben okula gidiyorum!" diye seslendi. "Arkadaşlarıma anlatacak o kadar çok şey var ki!"
Çantasında Mars taşı, kafasında yıldızlar, kalbinde keşif ateşiyle {CHILD_NAME} yeni bir güne başladı.
Aferin sana {CHILD_NAME}!

scenes.setting: Ev önünde, sabah ışığı, okula koşuş

funFacts.title: Biliyor muydun? ☄️
facts: Merkür'de bir gün (günbatımından gündoğumuna) 176 Dünya günü sürer! Yani orada bir gün neredeyse yarım yıl demek.
Venüs, kendi ekseni etrafında ters yönde döner. Yani Venüs'te Güneş batıdan doğar, doğudan batar!
Dünyamız yaklaşık 4,5 milyar yaşında! Yani Dünya çok çok yaşlı bir gezegen.
Mars'ta şu anda 3 aktif robot kaşifçi (rover) çalışıyor. En sonuncusu Perseverance, 2021'de indi!
Mars ile Jüpiter arasında binlerce asteroidin oluşturduğu bir kuşak var. Buna Asteroit Kuşağı denir.

funFacts.title: Biliyor muydun? 🪐
facts: Jüpiter'in 95 tane bilinen uydusu (ayı) var! En büyüğü Ganymede, Merkür gezegeninden bile büyüktür.
Satürn'ün halkaları çoğunlukla buzdan oluşur. Bazı buz parçaları bir ev kadar büyük olabilir!
Uranüs 98 derecelik eğimiyle adeta yan yatmış şekilde döner. Bilim insanları buna hâlâ şaşırıyor!
Neptün'deki rüzgârlar saatte 2100 kilometreye ulaşır. Bu Dünya'daki en güçlü kasırganın 5 katıdır!
Plüton 2006 yılında gezegen sınıflandırmasından çıkarıldı ve 'cüce gezegen' olarak kabul edildi.

coverPrompt:
FULL PAGE CHILDREN'S STORYBOOK FRONT COVER ILLUSTRATION — 2:3 portrait format. FLAT full-bleed print-ready cover, NOT a 3D mockup.

TITLE TEXT: "{CHILD_NAME}'ın Güneş Sistemi Macerası"
SUBTITLE: "Öğreten ve Eğlendiren Bir Keşif Hikâyesi"
TYPOGRAPHY — Title in colorful watercolor-splash style, each word a different space color (deep blue, vivid purple, warm orange, cosmic teal). Subtitle in elegant thin white font below. Turkish characters rendered PERFECTLY.

PERSONALIZATION BADGE: "Bu kitap {CHILD_NAME} için özel olarak üretilmiştir" — golden ornate badge bottom right corner.

CHARACTER: CHARACTER_DESC wearing a space-themed navy blue t-shirt with colorful planet prints, sitting on a wooden stool in a cozy bedroom, looking through a beautiful brass telescope with one eye pressed to the eyepiece, a magical swirling galaxy and miniature solar system emerging from the telescope lens with glowing orbiting planets and stardust trails and tiny comets, the child's face showing pure wonder and awe with big sparkling eyes and an amazed open-mouth smile, golden magical light illuminating the face from the telescope vision.

COMPOSITION: Title occupying top 30 percent, character with telescope and magical galaxy scene in middle 50 percent, personalization badge in bottom 15 percent. Rich dark space background with stars transitioning to warm bedroom glow.

ART STYLE: 3D Pixar and Disney CGI render quality, magical space colors blending cosmic purples and blues with warm interior amber glow, volumetric lighting, lens flares from planets, hyper-detailed textures. Mood: meraklı, büyülenmiş, keşifçi.
